case_title: SALVATORE BELLECI VS. PATRICK'S CHEVRON et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE CASE CONTINUED AS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF AND AGREED BY DEFENDANTS. RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELLECI, SALVATORE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEFF NGUYEN--MANAGER AND ALVARES JOSE--AUTO TECHNICIAN. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY BELLECI, SALVATORE AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK'S CHEVRON NGUYEN, JEFF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-13-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK'S CHEVRON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-13-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, JEFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELLECI, SALVATORE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATRICK'S CHEVRON NGUYEN, JEFF PLAINTIFF DID NOT SUFFICIENTLY PROVE DEFENDANT'S RESPONSIBILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-06-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SENT A LETTER THROUGH PAUL GUADARRAMA ASKING FOR A CONTINUANCE, DUE TO AN FAMILY EMERGENCY, HE COULD NOT COME TO TODAY'S HEARING. CASE CONTIUED TO 5/6/14 AS REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF'S LETTER AND AGREED BY DEFENDANTS. APPEARANCES (2) BY DEFENDANTS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PATRICK'S CHEVRON
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY BELLECI, SALVATORE PATRICK'S CHEVRON NGUYEN, JEFF
